snippet.title: THE DARK ROOMS - VEINS | Trailer 1
snippet.description:
THE DARK ROOMS - VEINS

There is another world behind the cinema halls. Cinema complexes have hidden dark transport passageways that connect the empty halls with one another. A labyrinth of back corridors, projection rooms and dark chambers.
The exhibition leads you through this tunnel system.
At the end there are 8 large old cinema halls, some completely gutted, some with a landscape of reclining cinema seats.
In this atmosphere, international light and sound artists build their installations...

Artworks by:

snippet.title: GTA 6 Trailer 3: DIESER Tag ist entscheidend! (PC & Online Leaks)
snippet.description:
Der GTA 6 Trailer Nummer 3 steht kurz vor der Tür und ein ganz entscheidendes Datum rückt immer näher! In diesem Video decken wir auf, wie die berüchtigten Rockstar Games Leaker dem Studio unbeabsichtigt zu über einer Milliarde Dollar Aktiengewinn verholfen haben und warum diese Gratiswerbung unbezahlbar war. Außerdem verraten uns brandneue Insider-Infos endlich, wie lange wir wirklich auf den PC-Release warten müssen und in welchem Zeitraum der neue GTA 6 Online-Modus an den Start geht. Wir analysieren im Detail, warum der kommende Take-Two Earning Call im Mai der absolute Schlüsselmoment für den nächsten Trailer ist. Passend dazu schauen wir uns eine extrem realistische Marketing-Timeline der nächsten Monate an – vom Cover Reveal über die Collector's Edition bis hin zu den ersten Gameplay-Trailern. Natürlich werfen wir auch einen Blick auf die irren Einnahmen von GTA V und klären, warum die PlayStation 5 der unangefochtene VIP-Partner für Rockstar ist. Ob das Spiel sogar für die Switch 2 erscheinen könnte und welches versteckte Detail Jasons wahre Stärke verrät, erfahrt ihr ebenfalls hier. Lasst uns gemeinsam die Wartezeit verkürzen und in den Kommentaren diskutieren, was uns bis zum großen Release erwartet!

Hey und willkommen! 
In meinen Videos tauchen wir tief in die Welt von GTA 6 ein und beleuchten alle aktuellen Leaks, Spekulationen und offiziellen Informationen rund um das heiß ersehnte Spiel! Wir analysieren detailliert die neuesten Gerüchte, diskutieren mögliche Schauplätze, Charaktere und Gameplay-Features und schauen uns an, welche offiziellen Fakten Rockstar Games bereits bestätigt hat. Außerdem werfen wir einen Blick auf Insider-Informationen und geben unsere Einschätzungen dazu ab, was uns in Grand Theft Auto VI erwarten könnte. Wenn du kein Detail verpassen willst, abonnier den Kanal und aktiviere die Glocke! Viel Spaß beim Zuschauen!

snippet.title: 2026 ist Starfield endlich ein "Weltraum"-Rollenspiel - Aber hat's auch eine 2. Chance verdient?
snippet.description:
Wenn jede Millisekunde zählt - Mit der uRage Reaper 820 Gaming-Maus und einer beeindruckenden 8.000 Hz Polling Rate reagiert ihr blitzschnell auf das Spielgeschehen. Mehr Informationen unter: https://www.urage.com/de/de/gaming-maus-reaper-820-wireless-00217847?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=HAMA_Urage_Webedia_Traffic_Youtube_na_na_B2C_Paid_DE_2604-2604&utm_term=webedia_reaper_820&utm_content=youtube_shoutout_gaming_maus_reaper_820 (Werbung) 

Mehr als ein Jahr lang herrschte bei Starfield zuletzt fast völlige Funkstille, was neue Updates oder DLCs anging. Tatsächlich wurde aber weiter an dem Spiel gearbeitet und das Ergebnis können wir seit ein paar Tagen spielen. Denn es gibt jetzt nicht nur eine PS5-Version, einen neuen DLC (Terran Armada) und demnächst wahrscheinlich sogar eine Switch-2-Fassung, sondern vor allem auch das neue, fast schon transformative  Free-Lanes-Update. 

Wir haben uns das 1.000 Welten große Sci-Fi-Rollenspiel von Bethesda nochmal angeschaut, stellen die wichtigsten Neuerungen seit dem Release in 2023 vor und erklären, warum Starfield 2026 vor allem für die Fans einen neuen Besuch wert ist.

snippet.title: Manelele Viitorului - DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
💔🔥 Manelele Viitorului – DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)

„Haide du-te du-te du-te… te trec la iubiri pierdute” 💔
Dacă ai trecut printr-o relație care te-a terminat… piesa asta e pentru tine.

🎶 „DU-TE DU-TE” este o manea de despărțire cu atitudine, nerv și vibe de balans, genul ăla de piesă pe care o pui tare și zici: gata, s-a terminat!

💥 Refrenul este extrem de catchy și făcut să prindă peste tot:
👉 TikTok
👉 mașină
👉 chefuri

💭 Dar vine momentul în care zici:
👉 „ia du-te-n durerea mea!”

🔥 Fix stilul Manelele Viitorului:
👉 emoție + nerv + adevăr + vibe de hit

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 - Official Adeptus Mechanicus CGI Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the latest Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 CGI trailer for this upcoming real-time strategy game. Witness the cold precision of the Adeptus Mechanicus and their unwavering devotion to the Machine God. Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 will be available on PC in 2026.

Led by Magos Dominus Nulpherus-1, an expedition breaches the depths of a dormant Necron Tomb on Kronus in pursuit of forbidden knowledge. As the Necron legions awaken, the Adeptus Mechanicus must make a choice. Undeterred by the imminent Xenos threat, the Adeptus Mechanicus press forward with calculated resolve. 

All knowledge is sacred for the Adeptus Mechanicus and all must be known by the Machine. 

This is the will of the Omnissiah.

#Warhammer40000DawnOfWar4 #Gaming #IGN

snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama

[유미의 세포들 시즌3 (Yumi's Cells 3) OST Part 3] 한 (HAN) (Stray Kids) - Let It Show MV

[유미의 세포들 시즌3 OST Part 3]

'Let It Show'는 무뚝뚝하고 감정을 잘 드러내지 않던 순록(김재원 분)이 유미(김고은 분)를 만나며 서서히 마음을 열고 변화해가는 과정을 가사에 은유적으로 담아낸 곡으로, 청량하면서도 달달한 분위기가 어우러진 미디엄 템포의 신스팝 트랙이다.

[Credits]

Lyrics by FLUM3N
Composed by FLUM3N, IRIS(MonoTree), HeavenW, MINN
Arranged by FLUM3N, HeavenW, MINN

Chorus by 우성준
Guitar by 안병룡
Drums by MINN
Bass by FLUM3N

Piano by HeavenW

Digital Editing by 김민석 @ salpotstudios
Recorded by 유재범 @ doobdoob Studio

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้
กำกับซีรีส์ : วาสุเทพ เกตุเพ็ชร์

snippet.title: 007 First Light - Tribute Trailer
snippet.description:
Pre-order 007 First Light now to unlock 4 exclusive outfit skins, Gleaming items pack, and 24H early access.

https://bit.ly/007FirstLightPre-Order

007 First Light comes to PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC on May 27th, 2026, and Nintendo Switch 2 this summer.

Our channels 
Visit the website: https://www.007FirstLightGame.com 
Discord: https://www.discord.gg/007FirstLight 
Twitter: https://x.com/007Gameioi 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@007gameioi 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/007GameIOI/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/007Gameioi 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/007game.ioi.dk 
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/007Gameioi 
Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/007FirstLight/

Earn the Number. 007 First Light is a thrilling espionage action-adventure game from IO Interactive. Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training programme, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.

ABOUT IO INTERACTIVE 
IO Interactive is an independent videogame developer and publisher with studios in Copenhagen, Malmö, Barcelona, Istanbul, and Brighton. As the creative force behind some of the most talked-about multiplatform video games in the last two decades, IOI is dedicated to creating unforgettable characters and experiences using their award-winning proprietary Glacier technology. IO Interactive will develop and publish a reimagined James Bond origin story with 007 First Light and is currently developing a new IP under the codename Project Fantasy. For more information, visit: https://ioi.dk.

snippet.title: ROSALÍA - Focu 'Ranni (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Official video for "Focu 'Ranni” by ROSALÍA

'LUX (Complete Works)' Out Now https://ROSALIA.lnk.to/LUXComplete
Shop 'LUX' https://rosalia.lnk.to/lux-store

Directed by Petra Collins 

LYRICS: 
Ya yo me solté la coleta
quería ir de blanco y fui de violeta
la arena que en tus manos la sujetas
resbala de tus puños si la aprietas

Mejor hablar
ahora que
callarme para siempre
y puedo decir
que estoy en paz
por mi lao

No seré tu mitad
nunca de tu propiedad
seré mía
y de mi libertad

Lo que se construyó con amor
es más difícil de incendiar
pero habrá fuegos que
no podrás apagar

Ya nadie tirará arroz al cielo
ya no habrá borrachera ni flores
ya no habrá nadie que bendiga
un amor que en verdad desconoce

Grabé tu nombre en mis costillas
pero mi corazón nunca tuvo tus iniciales
tarde o temprano el destino te golpea
aunque ignores sus señales

(Siciliano)
Tu
u me focu ‘ranni
mi jittaiu nta lu nenti
pi nun pèrdiri a libbirta’
E l’amure senza liggi
è l’unicu c’accittassi
mi jeccu nta lu nenti
prima d’abbruciarimi

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Marathi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
युक्ती, शक्ती आणि भक्तीच्या अजरामर शौर्यगाथेचे साक्षीदार व्हा! 🙏🏻

This is Footloose, Kenny Loggins
Been workin' so hard
I'm punchin' my card
Eight hours, for what?
Oh, tell me what I got
I got this feeling
That time's just holdin' me down
I'll hit the ceiling
Or else I'll tear up this town
Tonight, I gotta cut loose, footloose

Kick off your Sunday shoes
Please, Louise
Pull me off of my knees
Jack, get back
Come on before we crack
Lose your blues
Everybody, cut footloose
You're playin' so cool
Obeyin' every rule
But dig way down in your heart

Somebody to tell you
Life ain't passin' you by
I'm tryin' to tell you

Everybody, cut, everybody, cut
Everybody, cut, everybody, cut
Everybody, cut, everybody (everybody!)
Everybody, cut footloose

snippet.title: EVEN WHEN YOU'RE GONE - EXTENDED — | Emotional Uplifting | Female Vocal Trance | Lumi Elara
snippet.description:
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/0Hg44Qjgwv4Bba35YtJbMC?si=9ec7e75d097e460c

Apple Music: https://music.apple.com/us/album/even-when-youre-gone-single/1870002873

An uplifting female trance journey shaped by memory, distance, and emotion.
“Even When You’re Gone” explores the quiet space love leaves behind — where someone may be gone, but never truly disappears. Every melody feels like a memory, every drop like a wave of something you can’t let go of.

This extended version pulls you deeper into that feeling, with longer builds, wider atmospheres, and emotional releases that linger — made for late nights, empty roads, and moments when everything feels a little too real.

Let the sound stay with you…
even when they’re gone.

#upliftingtrance #trancemusic #femaletrance #melodictrance #emotionaltrance #luminight #edm2026 #extendedmix #trancefamily
